up.method: MODEL median flux from FBA/flux sampling under DMM (Table 2); glucose uptake essentially the normalized constraint (~1 mmol/gDW/h), NOT a measured rate
model median flux, flux sampling under DMM (Table 2)

mfa.note: model median (flux sampling), ST-CNB440 iCC926 model, DMM

growth_records.cite: Carolina A. Contador et al. Use of genome-scale models to get new insights into the marine actinomycete genus Salinispora. BMC Systems Biology (2019). DOI:10.1186/s12918-019-0683-1. [PMC6341766]
growth_records.method: experimentally observed growth in DMM (growth curves, Fig S4), but no numeric specific growth rate reported in main text; strain-specific growth-rate differences noted qualitatively
growth_records.snippet: Median flux values of essential nutrient uptake reactions... Glucose -0.99191... Ammonium -2.929... Sulfate -0.3839... Oxygen -2.5176 [mmol gDw-1 h-1] (ST-CNB440).
growth_records.notes: GEM (FBA/flux-sampling) study, NOT experimental rates. Uptake fluxes (Table 2) are MODEL medians from flux sampling under DMM with glucose uptake normalized to ~1 mmol/gDW/h; flagged is_experimental=false. Growth in DMM was confirmed in vitro (growth curves, Fig S4a/b) but no numeric mu given in accessible text (Additional file 4). No auxotrophies found experimentally. Included for the model exchange fluxes; DMM = 20 mM carbon source + SF2 salts (full composition in Contador et al. ref 22).
